description_long: This modern house features a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with large rectangular windows. The front yard includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, a fenced patio area with outdoor seating, and a swimming pool. The exterior walls are primarily light gray, complemented by darker accents on the garage and fencing. The backyard is enclosed and includes a play area with swings and a small garden. The house has two visible stories, with the upper level featuring additional windows and a rooftop terrace. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces, privacy, and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, fenced patio, pool, and play area, all in a clean geometric style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, fenced patio, pool, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio, and play area, with the garage and house structure extending back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and the upper story, minimal outdoor features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and patio area, with less emphasis on the pool and play area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple modern door, no porch, direct access from paved driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
